description.ko: 흑백의 타이밍 격자가 날카로운 글리치 기하로 분열되며 속도와 혼돈, 정밀한 질서가 균형을 이룹니다.
description.en: A monochrome timing lattice fractures into sharp glitch geometry, balancing speed, chaos, and exact order.

prompt: KURO-X artwork titled "Skew Clock Lattice": an intense black and white geometric abstraction rendered as a fractured timing lattice caught between perfect alignment and violent digital slip. The image is entirely abstract: no figure, logo, lettering, sculpture, sphere, cube, monolith, or single centerpiece. Matte #1A1A1A angular cells interlock with hard #FFFFFF void channels, while #808080 and #C0C0C0 shards form sliced trapezoid clocks, broken diamond registers, serrated diagonal hinges, offset triangular counters, and thin parallel fault rails. The composition bends around several invisible axes of rotation, creating a fast strobing sense of torsion without becoming circular or symmetrical. Fine horizontal scanlines cross every plane, disrupted by grayscale jitter, luma tearing, dropped-frame slices, hard compression squares, snapped calibration dashes, and medium-density square particles. Crisp vector edges, severe sharp angles, high contrast, cold mechanical depth, monochrome complexity, chaos within order, perfect balance created by fragments.
